desc: Washington Nationals optioned RHP Josiah Gray to Rochester Red Wings.
Milwaukee Brewers optioned LHP Robert Gasser to Nashville Sounds.
Washington Nationals placed RHP Josiah Gray on the 60-day injured list. Right flexor strain.
Washington Nationals recalled RHP Josiah Gray from Rochester Red Wings.
Baltimore Orioles placed 3B Jordan Westburg on the 10-day injured list retroactive to March 23, 2026. Right elbow UCL sprain.
New York Yankees placed RHP Gerrit Cole on the 15-day injured list. Tommy John surgery recovery.
New York Yankees activated RHP Cade Winquest.
RHP Christian Scott assigned to FCL Mets from Syracuse Mets.
Toledo Mud Hens placed 2B Hao-Yu  Lee on the 7-day injured list.
Atlanta Braves optioned RHP Didier Fuentes to Gwinnett Stripers.
Kansas City Royals sent 2B Michael Massey on a rehab assignment to Omaha Storm Chasers.
Baltimore Orioles transferred 3B Jordan Westburg from the 10-day injured list to the 60-day injured list. Right elbow UCL sprain.
RHP Christian Scott assigned to Syracuse Mets from FCL Mets.
Kansas City Royals activated 2B Michael Massey from the 10-day injured list.
Atlanta Braves placed CF Michael Harris II on the paternity list.
Atlanta Braves activated CF Michael Harris II from the paternity list.
Cleveland Guardians optioned 1B CJ Kayfus to Columbus Clippers.
